# waggle_slots (Resource)

Manages a slots resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# waggle_slots — a "t-shirt size" VM template (vcpu / ram / disk) used when
# sizing pools. id/created_at/updated_at are computed (server-assigned).

resource "waggle_slots" "small" {
  name    = "small"
  vcpu    = 2
  ram_gb  = 8
  disk_gb = 40
}

output "small_slot_id" {
  value = waggle_slots.small.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `disk_gb` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `ram_gb` (Number)
- `vcpu` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
